description: A vertical memorial graphic. The upper left holds a framed portrait of a smiling man with dark hair in a dark suit and tie. The right side shows red roses in front of a U.S. flag. At the bottom, large white serif text reads Wall of Honor beside a blue ribbon with an ICE badge logo, with smaller text reading Special Agent James Bernard Fuller, End of Watch, Monday, May 7, 1984.
notable_text: Wall of Honor; Special Agent James Bernard Fuller; End of Watch; Monday, May 7, 1984
